title: Who is He in yonder stall
firstLine: Who is He in yonder stall,
publicDomainBasis: Benjamin Russell Hanby (1833–1867), Benjamin Russell Hanby (1833–1867). All public domain.

sections.label: Verse 1
sections.text:
Who is He in yonder stall,
At whose feet the shepherds fall?

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Who is He in deep distress,
Fasting in the wilderness?

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Who is He the people bless
For His words of gentleness?

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Who is He to whom they bring
All the sick and sorrowing?

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Who is He that stands and weeps
At the grave where Lazarus sleeps?

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Who is He the gathering throng
Greet with loud triumphant song?

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Lo! at midnight, who is He
Prays in dark Gethsemane?

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Who is He on yonder tree
Dies in grief and agony?

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Who is He who from the grave
Comes to succor, help, and save?

sections.label: Chorus
sections.text:
Who is He who from His throne
Rules through all the worlds alone?
